hero.subtitle: Architect Rody Godoy
hero.description: Architecture with purpose. We create memorable spaces through light, matter, and functional innovation.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Architecture that creates experiences
about.p1: At Rody Godoy Architecture we believe that architecture must go beyond building spaces; it must create experiences that improve people's lives.
about.p2: Our studio specializes in the design and development of architectural projects that combine functionality, aesthetics, and sustainability, adapting to each client's needs.

projects.subtitle: Portfolio
projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.supabase_not_configured: Supabase URL or key was missing when this site was built. In GitHub Actions, set repository Variable VITE_SUPABASE_URL and Secret VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_DEFAULT_KEY on the Build step, then redeploy. Or set VITE_USE_STATIC_PROJECTS=true to use bundled JSON.

philosophy.subtitle: Philosophy
philosophy.title: Design with Purpose
philosophy.p1_desc: Each space must respond to the real needs of those who use it.
philosophy.p2_desc: Design must transmit identity, balance, and character.
philosophy.p3_desc: We seek to integrate solutions that optimize resources, energy, and environmental comfort.
philosophy.p4_desc: Quality in design and materials guarantees spaces that endure over time.

process.subtitle: Our Process
process.title: From idea to reality.
process.st1_desc: We listen to the client's ideas and needs to understand the project's scope and vision.
process.st2_desc: We develop design proposals and realistic visualizations that bring initial ideas to life.
process.st3_desc: We prepare detailed technical plans and all necessary documentation for execution.
process.st4_desc: We accompany the execution process, ensuring every detail is built according to design.
process.st5_desc: The project comes to life with the highest quality standards, ready to be inhabited.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
contact.description: We are ready to help you transform your idea into a real space. Schedule a consultation to discuss your project and discover how we can work together.

admin.not_admin_title: This account is not an admin.
admin.not_admin_body: Ask a project owner to run in Supabase SQL Editor: update public.profiles set is_admin = true where id = '<your user id from Authentication → Users>'.
admin.access_denied_title: You do not have admin access.
admin.access_denied_body: A project owner must set is_admin = true on your row in public.profiles (match your user id from Authentication → Users).
admin.help_sign_in: If sign-in fails: confirm the user exists under Authentication → Users, Email auth is enabled, and the email is confirmed (or disable confirm email for testing).
admin.projects_confirm_delete: Delete this project and all its media?
admin.categories_confirm_delete: Delete this category? Projects using it may be blocked by FK.
admin.project_media_confirm_remove: Remove this file from the project?
admin.project_save_first_upload_media: Save the project first, then upload media.
admin.error_boundary_body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
admin.site_settings_upload_help: Uploads to Storage under site/hero/ and updates the object path.
